creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best summer spot in Copenhagen? 🇩🇰👇

Summer is finally starting to show up in Copenhagen so this place is a true lifesaver 🤠

This little perfect swimming spot is called Badezone Byskoven if you wanna check it out on Google Maps 🤝

The nearest metro station is Sluseholmen, and the walk is beautiful, but around 3,5 kilometres, and you’re not going to pass any shops, so make sure you load up on water/snacks. And please use the bins for your rubbish 😇

I’ve got loads of awesome videos about Copenhagen with more hidden gems and insider tips on my Youtube channel if you want to discover more Copenhagen spots like this - search for “Destination Well Known” or use the link in my profile 🤝  #copenhagen #copenhagen🇩🇰 #denmarktravel

transcription.text: Here's a proper hidden gem in Copenhagen, so please guys, shhh. This spot is absolutely perfect in the summer time when the swim spots in the city centre are packed and noisy. Here there are never really that many people and it's probably the prettiest place to go for a swim in Copenhagen. Make sure to bring your own snacks and drinks as there aren't any shops around. It truly is a lovely secluded place in the Danish capital.
